# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
    N = int(input[0])
    people = []
    for i in range(1, N + 1):
        name, age = input[i].split()
        people.append((name, int(age)))

    # Find the index of the youngest person
    min_age = min(p[1] for p in people)
    youngest_index = next(i for i, p in enumerate(people) if p[1] == min_age)

    # Output names starting from the youngest person in clockwise order
    for i in range(N):
        index = (youngest_index + i) % N
        print(people[index][0])

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
